x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Several tools are aspirational (candidates/contests/results have no source data yet — the schemas define what should exist).

server.name: io.nyc.elections
server.title: NYC Elections
server.description: Agent-native access to NYC Board of Elections data — poll sites, elections, contests, candidates, results (incl. ranked-choice), and mail-ballot request/tracking. Today only poll sites are machine-readable; this surface defines the elections API that should exist.
server.instructions: find_poll_site answers 'where do I vote' (grounded in Open Data). list_elections / find_contests / find_candidates answer 'when is the election / what's on my ballot / who's running' (aspirational — PDF-only today). get_results returns contest results incl. ranked-choice rounds. request_mail_ballot and track_mail_ballot require an authenticated voter; request_mail_ballot mutates state — confirm details with the user first.

tools.name: find_poll_site
tools.title: Find Poll Site
tools.description: Find a NYC poll site by address, borough, or election district. Grounded in the Voting/Poll Sites Open Data dataset (with accessibility info).

tools.name: list_elections
tools.title: List Elections
tools.description: List NYC elections and their key dates (registration, early voting, mail-ballot deadlines).

tools.name: find_contests
tools.title: Find Contests (What's on my ballot)
tools.description: List the contests on the ballot for an election, optionally by office/district. Aspirational — PDF contest lists today.

tools.name: find_candidates
tools.title: Find Candidates (Who's running)
tools.description: List candidates for an election/office. Aspirational — candidate lists are PDFs today.

tools.name: get_results
tools.title: Get Election Results
tools.description: Get election results for an election (by contest or election-district level), including ranked-choice rounds. Aspirational — PDFs + legacy viewer today.

tools.name: request_mail_ballot
tools.title: Request Mail Ballot
tools.description: Submit a request for an absentee / mail-in ballot. NET-NEW workflow (fronts requestballot.vote.nyc). Requires an authenticated voter. Mutates state — confirm details with the user first.

tools.name: track_mail_ballot
tools.title: Track Mail Ballot
tools.description: Track the status of a mail-ballot request (mailed, returned, counted).
